dependencies: Reliance on natural gas pipelines and transportation facilities owned and operated by third parties
Dependence on transmission and distribution facilities owned and operated by others
Coal supply from Powder River Basin
Rail transportation and rail car lease agreements for coal transport
Single contracted supplier or small number of suppliers for fuel, chemicals and services at certain facilities
Sole or limited source suppliers for critical components for smart home products
risks: Disruption of fuel supplies or curtailments in production
Counterparty failure to perform or disruption in fuel delivery infrastructure
Localized shortages and delays from extreme weather
Dependence on third-party cellular, telecommunications and internet providers for smart home services

GHG emissions regulations
Combustion byproducts regulations
Water use and discharge regulations
Threatened and endangered species regulations

Cross-State Air Pollution Rule (CSAPR)
Regional Haze Proposal
Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS)
Effluent Limitations Guidelines (ELG)
Coal combustion residuals (CCR) regulations under RCRA
FERC regulation and market-based rate authority
NERC reliability standards and potential penalties
State and provincial retail competition laws and regulations
PUCT and ERCOT standards and regulations in Texas
ISO and RTO market rules and tariff changes
State public utility commission regulations
Maryland legislation restricting competitive retail electric and natural gas market (Senate Bill 1)
Alberta Rate of Last Resort regulation
CFTC derivatives market regulations
Position limits on futures and derivatives
Margin requirements for derivatives
Federal and state laws related to consumer financing
State regulations governing smart home and electronic security systems
Licensing requirements for smart home services
FTC and Federal Communications Commission telemarketing regulations
Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA)
Data privacy and data protection laws (PIPEDA in Canada, CCPA in California)
Enhanced data privacy legislation in multiple states
Federal Trade Commission settlement compliance requirements for Vivint Smart Home

NYSPSC alleged non-compliance notices
Tax law changes including 15% Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT) from Inflation Reduction Act
Capacity Performance product rules in PJM market

PJM Base Residual Auction revisions and delays
Independent Market Monitor Market Seller Offer Cap regulations

sanction_risks: Impact of changing U.S. trade policies and potential additional tariffs
International conflict increasing risk of state-sponsored cyber threats
Geopolitical climate escalating cybersecurity risk for U.S. critical infrastructure
